display.purpose: Hero headlines on the landing page and major section titles only.

label.purpose: Button text, input labels, metadata, stats.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action per view. Blue with white text, rounded corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action with border and transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #111827; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f9fafb; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action with no border, minimal presence.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #6b7280; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f9fafb; color: #111827; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Clean, minimal text input with gray border and blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-width: 0; background: transparent; color: #111827; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.5rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; line-height: 1.25; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standard content container with border, no shadow.

components.name: Bordered Card
components.description: Emphasized card with slightly stronger border for visual distinction.
components.html:
Emphasized

A slightly stronger border for emphasis.

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard stat display with accent-colored icon capsule. No glow effect.
components.html:
Total Revenue

$12,450
components.css: .ds-card-stat { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card-stat:hover { border-color: #d1d5db; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Dashboard sidebar navigation item with blue active indicator.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: #6b7280; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f9fafb; color: #111827; } .ds-nav-link--active { background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; } .ds-nav-link--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 1.25rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #2563eb; }

components.name: Course Card
components.description: Full course listing card with thumbnail, category pill, metadata, and pricing.
components.html:
Web Dev

Full-Stack JavaScript

Learn modern JavaScript.

4.81.2k
components.css: .ds-card-course { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 1rem; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card-course:hover { border-color: #d1d5db; }

narrative.overview:
Purposeful emptiness. Every element on screen earns its place through utility, not decoration. The interface breathes — generous whitespace, restrained use of the single accent color, and a typographic hierarchy that guides the eye without visual noise.

This direction rejects decorative warmth, tonal gradients, and expressive color in favor of clarity, precision, and trust. The platform feels like a well-edited document: nothing extraneous, everything intentional.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans-serif typeface (Geist) for everything — hierarchy from size/weight/spacing only
One accent color (blue) used sparingly — CTAs, links, active states
Flat or near-flat surfaces — depth from borders and whitespace, not shadows
Minimal motion — fades and transitions only when serving a purpose

rules.name: The Single-Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue may appear on CTAs, links, active nav items, and data highlights only — never as decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-Surface Rule
rules.body: Cards and containers are distinguished by subtle borders, not shadows. Only modals and dropdowns may carry shadows.

rules.name: The Single-Font Rule
rules.body: Geist is the only typeface. Never introduce a second font for headings or decoration.

rules.name: The Border-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards use borders for separation. Shadows are reserved for floating UI only.

dos: Do use blue (#2563eb) sparingly — CTAs, links, active nav items, key data highlights only.
Do rely on borders and whitespace for visual separation — cards sit flush with a 1px border.
Do use white backgrounds in light mode, slate-gray backgrounds in dark mode.
Do use Geist for everything — headings, body, labels.
Do provide hover and focus-visible feedback on every interactive element.
donts: Don't use blue decoratively — no blue icons, blue backgrounds, or blue flourishes.
Don't create gradients, glow effects, or decorative shadows.
Don't use a second typeface or any decorative font.
Don't use warm tones, orange, or any color outside the neutral + blue palette.
Don't animate decoratively — fades for state changes only.
Don't use heavy box-shadows on resting elements.
